notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9. It addresses 5 CVEs: CVE-2025-39971, CVE-2025-39955, CVE-2025-38718, CVE-2025-39973, CVE-2026-43037.
